name: Incident Response
description: A severity-ranked on-call workflow from detection to postmortem, with action items tracked as linked follow-up issues so lessons learned don't get lost after the fire is out.

teams.name: Site Reliability
teams.description: Owns incident response, on-call, and postmortems.

workflowStates.name: Detected
workflowStates.description: Alert fired or reported; severity not yet confirmed.

workflowStates.name: Identified
workflowStates.description: Root cause known; fix or mitigation in progress.

workflowStates.name: Resolved
workflowStates.description: Incident closed; postmortem may still be pending.

labels.name: sev-1
labels.description: Full outage or data loss — page immediately.

labels.name: data-loss-risk
labels.description: Possible data integrity or loss risk — escalate.

labels.name: postmortem-required
labels.description: SEV-1/SEV-2 policy requires a written postmortem.

issueTemplates.title: [INC] Payment webhook processing delayed up to 40 minutes
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
### Impact
Webhook-driven order confirmations delayed for ~2,100 customers.

### Timeline
- 14:02 — Alert fired: webhook queue depth > 5,000
- 14:08 — On-call acknowledged
- 14:35 — Root cause identified: downstream provider rate-limiting us
- 15:10 — Mitigation deployed (backoff + concurrency cap)

### Status
Monitoring for recurrence.

issueTemplates.title: Add circuit breaker around the payment-provider webhook client
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Prevents a single slow/rate-limited downstream dependency from backing up our whole queue again.

issueTemplates.title: Add a queue-depth alert threshold before it becomes customer-visible
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Current alert fired only once the delay was already noticeable. Lower the threshold and add an early-warning tier.

issueTemplates.title: [INC] Elevated 500s on the search endpoint
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
### Impact
Search returning errors for ~8% of requests.

### Timeline
- 09:14 — Alert fired
- 09:20 — Investigating: correlates with a deploy 10 minutes prior

issueTemplates.title: [INC] Database replica lag exceeded 30s
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
### Impact
Stale reads on the analytics dashboard only; no writes affected.

### Timeline
- 03:41 — Alert fired (off-hours, no page — below paging threshold)

issueTemplates.title: [INC] Suspected data-loss: bulk-delete ran against the wrong workspace filter
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
### Impact
UNDER INVESTIGATION — possible cross-tenant data loss from a migration script.

### Immediate actions
- Restoring from the pre-migration backup
- Freezing writes to the affected table until confirmed safe

views.name: Active Incidents
views.description: Everything not yet resolved, grouped by status — the on-call dashboard.

views.name: Postmortem Tracker
views.description: Resolved incidents that still need a written postmortem, plus their open action items.

views.name: All Incidents — Table
views.description: Full history with severity, duration, and customer-impact columns for the monthly reliability review.
